channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: On ‘Maul: Shadow Lord’, Not Everyone’s Willing to Learn a Lesson
item.description: The new 'Star Wars' animated series prepares Jedi and planets alike for a reckoning with the dark side.

item.title: IBM pays $17M fine to end DOJ suit over DEI programs
item.description: IBM entered into a $17 million settlement agreement on Friday with the U.S. DOJ over allegations that it engaged in “illegal DEI practices.”

item.title: PhD Student Uses Turntable to Create the Most Impractical Drum Machine Ever
item.description: A cleverly designed academic exercise in beatmatching angst.

item.title: Artemis III sera une mission de « premières » décisives pour le retour sur la Lune
item.description: Alors que les astronautes d'Artemis II ont remis le pied sur la terre ferme, la suite est déjà entamée avec la mission Artemis III, qui doit avoir lieu dès l'an prochain. Et si les ambitions de la Nasa ont été revues à la baisse, le défi technique reste tout de même considérable.

item.title: Microsoft is working on yet another OpenClaw-like agent
item.description: The company has also previously introduced agents that are able to complete tasks, Cowork and Copilot Tasks.

item.title: 'Building gigawatt data centers in the US is becoming increasingly difficult': Why Orbital is taking AI infrastructure into space to solve power and cooling issues
item.description: Orbital outlines its vision for space-based AI infrastructure, using solar-powered satellites to overcome energy and cooling limits and scale compute beyond Earth’s grid.

item.title: The kings of ANC headphones from Bose hit their Black Friday price of $199
item.description: Grab the Bose QuietComfort Headphones for $199 at Amazon right now — the same price we saw during Black Friday.

item.title: Score best-selling running shoes on a budget at Amazon — save up to 40% on Nike, Hoka, Brooks, and more
item.description: Amazon has a huge sale on best-selling running and walking shoes, and I'm rounding up the best deals, including up to 40% off Nike, Hoka, and New Balance.

item.title: Stanford report highlights growing disconnect between AI insiders and everyone else
item.description: Stanford’s latest AI Index shows a widening gap between experts and the public, with rising anxiety over jobs, healthcare, and the economy.

item.title: Games Workshop brings seven classic Warhammer games to Steam for the first time
item.description: Fans of miniature plastic soldiers, rejoice. Games Workshop has brought a host of older Warhammer and Warhammer 40K video games to Steam for the first time, alongside a dozen games that haven't been available on Valve's storefront for a few years. The new to Steam releases consist of three games from the Warhammer fantasy range — Shadow of the Horned Rat, Mark of Chaos – Gold Edition and Dark Omen — and four from its sci-fi 40K universe — Chaos Gate, Fire Warrior, Final Liberation and Rites of War. If you're a Warhammer fan of a certain age, some of these may be formative experiences for you....

item.title: Meta warned by dozens of organizations that facial recognition on its smart glasses would empower predators
item.description: Dozens of civil rights organizations have written a letter to Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg to warn of the dangers in bringing facial recognition technology to the company's smart glasses. More than 70 groups have banded together to form a coalition to urge Zuckerberg to abandon plans to incorporate the tech, on the grounds that it would empower stalkers, sexual predators and other bad actors. This coalition includes organizations like the ACLU, the Electronic Privacy Information Center, Fight for the Future, Access Now and many others. The letter isn't asking for safeguards. These groups want the ...

item.title: The Apple Watch Series 11 has returned to best-ever price
item.description: If you’re still holding onto an older Apple Watch, now might be a good time to upgrade. Right now, the 42mm Apple Watch Series 11 with GPS is on sale for around $299 ($100 off) at Amazon, Best Buy, and Target, which is its best price to date. If you prefer a larger size, the […]

item.title: FBI announces takedown of phishing operation that targeted thousands of victims
item.description: Cybercriminals allegedly used the W3LL phishing kit to target more than 17,000 victims worldwide, stealing their passwords and multi-factor authentication codes.

item.title: A Diarrhea-Causing Superbug Is on the Rise, Health Officials Warn
item.description: Shigella bacteria are increasingly resisting all antibiotics that can easily treat them, a recent report shows.

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg Is Officially a Bot
item.description: Just what employees want, a Zuckerberg chatbot serving as their personal Clippy.

item.title: Cet écran PC gaming OLED 4K 240 Hz par Samsung élève la fluidité au rang d’art et baisse son prix de 300 €
item.description: Le Samsung Odyssey OLED G8 G81SF est un écran PC gaming plat, sans bord, immersif et fluide que vous retrouvez à 849,99 euros au lieu de 1 149 euros sur Boulanger.

item.title: Hollywood’s Stars Are Beginning to Turn Against the Paramount-Warner Deal
item.description: After over 1,000 creatives signed an open letter speaking out against the merger, the company issued a swift but not exactly reassuring response.

item.title: Russia launched a covert operation to deploy undersea sabotage vessels in UK waters while the world was distracted by the Middle East - UK threatens Putin with ‘serious consequences’ if subversion continues
item.description: Russia launched a covert operation to sabotage subsea cables while the world was distracted by the Middle East.

item.title: AI Jesus Might Be the Thing That Finally Breaks MAGA’s Faith
item.description: Trump has now deleted the image of himself as Christ but many supporters are unhappy.

item.title: Retro handheld maker Anbernic's latest device has a swiveling display
item.description:
There are plenty of retro gaming handhelds on the market, but Anbernic is introducing one that offers a unique spin on the square shape. The retro gaming handheld maker revealed the RG Rotate on its YouTube channel, showing off a 1:1 display that swivels out much like the T-Mobile Sidekick of yore.
Anbernic often drip feeds details of its upcoming products over time, but so far, we know that the RG Rotate will run on Android, feature an aluminum alloy frame and come in Polar Black and Aurora Silver. Anbernic's video detailed that the handheld will have a "proprietary ultra-thin alloy hinge" t...

item.title: Xbox Game Pass ‘has become too expensive,’ says Microsoft’s new gaming chief in leaked memo
item.description: Microsoft's new Xbox chief, Asha Sharma, has signaled that Xbox Game Pass pricing is about to change. In an internal memo to Xbox employees, obtained by The Verge, Sharma admits that "Game Pass has become too expensive for players" and that Microsoft needs "a better value equation." "Game Pass is central to gaming value on […]

item.title: Et si ce forfait NRJ Mobile à 17,49 euros par mois rendait la fibre inutile ?
item.description: La série spéciale illimitée de NRJ Mobile tourne à 17,49 euros par mois pour 500 Go en 5G sans engagement. De quoi se passer d'une box Internet pour un usage classique.

item.title: George Méliès tried to warn us about an AI robot uprising 130 years ago, and I'm not surprised
item.description: A long-lost George Méliès depicts exactly the kind of human-robot interaction you don't want to see.

item.title: On a testé le Minisforum AtomMan G7 Pro : j’ai transformé un mini PC en console de salon
item.description: Un mini PC capable de faire tourner Cyberpunk 2077 en 1440p à 75 FPS, branché sur une TV 4K avec une manette Xbox. Il y a deux ans, ça aurait relevé de la science-fiction. Le Minisforum AtomMan G7 Pro, avec son Core i9-14900HX et sa RTX 5070 dans un boîtier de 3,3 cm d'épaisseur, rend la chose possible. Je l'ai installé dans mon salon pour voir si un PC pouvait vraiment offrir l'expérience d'une console. ...

item.title: 'Industrial-scale scam operations': Global criminal organization operated slave compounds in Asia behind huge malware-as-a-service hydra targeting 35+ government agencies monthly
item.description: Shocking report claims forced labor used to distribute malware in Cambodian compounds.
